job_description:
# Senior Healthcare Data Analyst - Remote
Company: Sentara Health
Source: Indeed
Employment type: Full-time
Checked: April 27, 2026
URL: https://www.indeed.com/viewjob?jk=9582f4a2151e38f8

- Remote senior healthcare analyst role in a health plan environment.
- Supports reports, dashboards, operational performance monitoring, and self-service analytics.
strengths: Health plan reporting and dashboard overlap

replacements.replace: Senior Healthcare Data Analyst | SQL | Dashboard Support | Operational Reporting
replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst

replacements.replace: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and delivering trusted healthcare data for reporting, dashboards, and operational analytics. Strong expertise in advanced SQL, ETL validation, data quality, and collaboration with business stakeholders to improve adoption and trust in analytical outputs.
replacements.find: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and delivering trusted enterprise data across healthcare (payer), banking, retail, and e-commerce domains. Deep hands-on expertise in advanced SQL, ETL validation, source-to-target testing, data quality, data warehousing, and production data support. Currently extending core skills into Snowflake, Databricks, Azure Data Factory, and Python to support cloud modernization and AI-ready data pipelines. Proven partner to engineering, QA, and business stakeholders—translating mapping documents and business rules into validation frameworks that protect reporting accuracy, regulatory compliance, and downstream analytics readiness.

replacements.replace: Power BI, Tableau, Excel (advanced – pivots, lookups, Power Query), dashboard QA and operational reporting support
replacements.find: Power BI, Tableau, Excel (advanced – pivots, lookups, Power Query)

replacements.replace: Partnered with cross-functional teams of 12+ across Agile sprints to clarify requirements, validate outputs, and support stakeholder-ready dashboards and performance reporting.
replacements.find: Partnered with cross-functional teams of 12+ (Business Analysts, QA, Data Engineers, downstream report owners) across 2-week Agile sprints; managed 150+ JIRA defects through triage, clarification, validation, and closure.

gaps: Senior customer-facing consulting support may be broader
Potentially more dashboard-heavy than current resume wording
notes: Tailored toward health-plan reporting, dashboards, self-service analytics support, and trusted operational data.
